p.c: function[T0: Mul, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) = fwd_shift[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](f, g, x)
function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](f, g, x)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](-d, -c)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[A](a + b, c + d)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](a + b, -c, -d)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[A](a, c)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[A](b, d)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](a + -c, b, -d)
function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](b, -c)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](b)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](-c)
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](a, -c, lib(functions).identity_fn(b))
function[T0: lib(add_semigroup).AddSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }[A](a, b, lib(functions).identity_fn(-c))

goal: pointwise_add[G, A](f, k, g * x) = f(g * x) + k(g * x)

p.c: function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[G, A](f, k, g * x)

goal: pointwise_add[G, A](f, k, x) = f(x) + k(x)

p.c: function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[G, A](f, k, x)

goal: fwd_diff[G, A](g, pointwise_add[G, A](f, k), x) = f(g * x) + k(g * x) - (f(x) + k(x))

p.c: function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](pointwise_add[G, A](f, k), g, x)

goal: fwd_diff[G, A](g, f, x) = f(g * x) - f(x)

p.c: function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](f, g, x)

goal: fwd_diff[G, A](g, k, x) = k(g * x) - k(x)

p.c: function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](k, g, x)
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[G](g * x)
constant(c, lib(functions).identity_fn(g * x)) != c
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[G, A](c, lib(functions).identity_fn(g * x))
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[G](x)
constant(c, lib(functions).identity_fn(x)) != c
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[G, A](c, lib(functions).identity_fn(x))

goal: fwd_diff[G, A](g, constant[G, A](c), x) = c - c

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[G](x)
function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](constant[G, A](c), g, lib(functions).identity_fn(x))
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[A](c, c)
function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0) { x0 + -x0 = T0.0 }[A](c)

goal: act.smul(r, a) - act.smul(r, b) = act.smul(r, a) + -act.smul(r, b)

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_group).AddGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + -x1 = x0 - x1 }[A](act.smul(r, a), act.smul(r, b))

goal: pointwise_smul[R, A, G](act, r, f, g * x) = act.smul(r, f(g * x))

p.c: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T2 -> T1, x3: T2) { x0.smul(x1, x2(x3)) = pointwise_smul[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[R, A, G](act, r, f, g * x)

goal: pointwise_smul[R, A, G](act, r, f, x) = act.smul(r, f(x))

p.c: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T2 -> T1, x3: T2) { x0.smul(x1, x2(x3)) = pointwise_smul[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[R, A, G](act, r, f, x)

goal: fwd_diff[G, A](g, pointwise_smul[R, A, G](act, r, f), x) = act.smul(r, f(g * x)) - act.smul(r, f(x))

p.c: function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](pointwise_smul[R, A, G](act, r, f), g, x)

goal: act.smul(r, f(g * x) - f(x)) = act.smul(r, f(g * x)) - act.smul(r, f(x))
fwd_diff[G, A](g, f, x) = f(g * x) - f(x)

p.c: function[T0: Mul, T1: AddCommGroup](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) - x0(x2) = fwd_diff[T0, T1](x1, x0, x2) }[G, A](f, g, x)

goal: pointwise_smul[R, A, G](act, r, fwd_diff[G, A](g, f), x) = act.smul(r, fwd_diff[G, A](g, f, x))

p.c: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T2 -> T1, x3: T2) { x0.smul(x1, x2(x3)) = pointwise_smul[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[R, A, G](act, r, fwd_diff[G, A](g, f), x)

goal: pointwise_smul[R, A, G](act, r, fwd_diff[G, A](g, f), x) = act.smul(r, f(g * x) - f(x))
